/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Tappa02.dir/Tappa02/main.cpp.o -o Tappa02  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics-s.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window-s.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system-s.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon _deps/sfml-build/lib/libfreetype.a
